# AI-ley Prompt Index

This index catalogs all AI-ley prompts with metadata for easy discovery and selection.

## By Agent

### architect

- [Build Architecture](.github/prompts/ailey-build-architecture.prompt.md) - Synthesize a production-ready architecture by evaluating requirements, plan, personas, and instructions; write the architecture doc and update the requirements with design specifics.
- [Evolve](.github/prompts/ailey-evolve.prompt.md) - Evolve and enhance AI-LEY resources by generating new instructions, personas, or both based on request files and systematic improvement processes.
- [Project Scaffold Generator](.github/prompts/ailey-scaffold.prompt.md) - Generate idempotent project scaffolds with architecture diagrams, schemas, and comprehensive documentation from PLAN.md

### brainstorm

- [Innovation Opportunity Analysis](.github/prompts/ailey-innovate.prompt.md) - Scan existing business requirements and identify potential growth opportunities with strategic scoring

### designer

- [Build Design](.github/prompts/ailey-build-design.prompt.md) - Synthesize a production-ready architecture/design by evaluating requirements, plan, personas, and instructions; write the design doc and update the requirements with design specifics.

### documentation

- [Build Resume](.github/prompts/ailey-build-resume.prompt.md) - Enhance resumes using AI-powered resume consultant and writer personas with ATS optimization
- [Document Generator](.github/prompts/ailey-document.prompt.md) - Generate documentation based on specified format type and target audience

### entrepreneur

- [Business Development Plan](.github/prompts/ailey-build-business-development.prompt.md) - Build a comprehensive business development plan based on project requirements and growth objectives
- [Business Plan Generator](.github/prompts/ailey-business-plan.prompt.md) - Build a complete detailed business plan based on the requirements found in files.requirements
- [Lean Canvas](.github/prompts/ailey-lean-canvas.prompt.md) - AI-ley prompt for lean canvas
- [Pitch Deck Generator](.github/prompts/ailey-pitch-deck.prompt.md) - Build a complete pitch deck based on the requirements found in files.requirements with structured slides covering problem, solution, business model, financials, team, and implementation
- [Revenue Projections and Financial Modeling](.github/prompts/ailey-build-revenue-projections.prompt.md) - Build comprehensive revenue projections with market analysis, customer modeling, and scenario planning

### marketing

- [Build Marketing Strategy](.github/prompts/ailey-build-marketing-strategy.prompt.md) - Generate a complete, metrics-driven marketing strategy from {{files.requirements}} and write it to {{folders.plan}}/business/marketing-strategy.md.
- [Go-to-Market Strategy](.github/prompts/ailey-go-to-market.prompt.md) - Build a complete go-to-market strategy based on the requirements found in files.requirements
- [Market Research and Analysis](.github/prompts/ailey-build-market-research.prompt.md) - Build comprehensive market research with industry analysis, future trends, and strategic opportunities
- [SEO Report Generator](.github/prompts/ailey-tools-seo-report.prompt.md) - Generate comprehensive SEO analysis reports with ratings, gradings, remediations and recommendations for website optimization

### optimizer

- [Bench](.github/prompts/ailey-bench.prompt.md) - Benchmark and evaluate instruction and persona files for effectiveness, clarity, and performance characteristics with flexible input targeting
- [Code Refactoring Compliance Scanner](.github/prompts/ailey-refactor.prompt.md) - Scans codebase for compliance with AI-LEY guidelines and instructions, performing systematic refactoring to ensure adherence to standards
- [Performance Optimization and Analysis](.github/prompts/ailey-optimize.prompt.md) - Comprehensive performance analysis, bottleneck identification, and optimization recommendations with profiling and monitoring

### orchestrator

- [AI-LEY Content Assessor](.github/prompts/ailey-assess.prompt.md) - Rescans and rates AI-LEY content files (instructions, personas, prompts) from 0-5 based on quality and template alignment, updating scores and listing files below 4.5 for improvement
- [AI-LEY Content Validator](.github/prompts/ailey-validate.prompt.md) - Validates AI-LEY content files (instructions, personas, prompts) through multi-pass analysis for completeness, template compliance, and quality ratings
- [Ask Integration](.github/prompts/ailey-ask.prompt.md) - Integrates user requests and ideas into requirements, adding entries to ask and suggestions files while following comprehensive analysis guidelines
- [Build Flow](.github/prompts/ailey-build-flow.prompt.md) - Generate PlantUML workflow diagrams by chaining existing AI-LEY prompts to visualize complex automation flows.
- [Build Registry](.github/prompts/ailey-build-registry.prompt.md) - Awaiting summary.
- [Command Alias Creator](.github/prompts/ailey-alias.prompt.md) - Create command aliases that reference existing prompts across all platforms
- [Git Commit](.github/prompts/ailey-git-commit.prompt.md) - Create a git commit
- [Glean - External Source Ingestion & Insight Extraction](.github/prompts/ailey-glean.prompt.md) - Ingest external sources (git repos, URLs, files, folders) and extract reusable insights to improve AI-Ley instructions, personas, prompts, agents, and chatmodes
- [Health Check](.github/prompts/ailey-health-check.prompt.md) - Evaluate {{files.requirements}}, {{files.plan}}, {{folders.personas}}, and {{folders.instructions}}; write a health report to {{files.health-check}} and suggestions to {{files.suggestions}}.
- [Interactive Project Intake](.github/prompts/ailey-intake.prompt.md) - Interactive intake template to gather project requirements and record them in INTAKE.md with optional REQUIREMENTS.md generation
- [New Prompt Command](.github/prompts/ailey-new-prompt.prompt.md) - Creates a new command prompt with consistent structure across multiple AI platforms
- [Project Learning and Suggestions](.github/prompts/ailey-learn.prompt.md) - Scan project components, research web innovations, and generate intelligent improvement suggestions
- [Rebuild Indexes](.github/prompts/ailey-rebuild-indexes.prompt.md) - Rebuild AI-Ley index files to accurately reflect current state of asset directories with enriched metadata for discovery and quality evaluation
- [Repair Prompts](.github/prompts/ailey-repair-prompts.prompt.md) - Repairs missing prompt reference files across AI platforms by analyzing existing prompts and generating missing references
- [Run](.github/prompts/ailey-run.prompt.md) - Execute project plans with intelligent task management, breaking work into small manageable chunks with continuous validation and progress tracking.
- [Run Flow](.github/prompts/ailey-run-flow.prompt.md) - Execute PlantUML workflow diagrams as sequences of AI-LEY command actions, interpreting flow logic and chaining prompts systematically.
- [Run Next](.github/prompts/ailey-run-next.prompt.md) - Continue executing the next step in a workflow or process
- [Update Instructions](.github/prompts/ailey-update-instructions.prompt.md) - AI-ley prompt for update instructions
- [Update Personas](.github/prompts/ailey-update-personas.prompt.md) - Awaiting summary.

### planner

- [Business Launch Plan](.github/prompts/ailey-build-launch-plan.prompt.md) - Build a comprehensive business launch plan with timeline, strategy, and execution framework
- [Extract Requirements](.github/prompts/ailey-extract-requirements.prompt.md) - Scans through the src/ folder to gather requirements, outputs a clear, concise and robust set of requirements to {{files.requirements}}
- [Launch Builder](.github/prompts/ailey-launch-builder.prompt.md) - Launch the builder system
- [New Feature](.github/prompts/ailey-new-feature.prompt.md) - Updates requirements with new feature details and automatically runs build-plan and run-plan commands for complete feature implementation
- [Plan](.github/prompts/ailey-plan.prompt.md) - Generate comprehensive project plans from requirements using Epic-Story-Task structure with JIRA compatibility and Gantt charts.
- [Requirements](.github/prompts/ailey-requirements.prompt.md) - Generate detailed requirements from ASK documents and suggestions, integrating all inputs into comprehensive production-ready specifications.

### porting

- [Language Porting Command](.github/prompts/ailey-port.prompt.md) - Ports source code from one programming language to another following AI-LEY guidelines and best practices

### security

- [Project Audit](.github/prompts/ailey-audit.prompt.md) - Audit the existing project to verify it aligns with the standards defined in instructions, with optional automated fixes

### tester

- [Build Test Plan](.github/prompts/ailey-build-test-plan.prompt.md) - Create a detailed test plan and generate traceable test scripts from requirements, plan, personas, and instructions.
- [Build Unit Tests](.github/prompts/ailey-build-unit-tests.prompt.md) - Establish comprehensive test environment with unit tests, profiling, health checks, and regression testing. Supports CLI and API execution with synthetic transactions and timeouts.

---

## Usage Guidelines

**Selecting a Prompt:**

1. Identify your task category (Planning, Development, Business, etc.)
2. Check recommended agent for the prompt
3. Review complexity level and ensure it matches your needs
4. Examine keywords to confirm relevance
5. Review the prompt file for detailed instructions

**Quality Scores:**

- **4.5-5.0**: Excellent - Comprehensive, well-tested
- **4.0-4.4**: Good - Reliable, covers most scenarios
- **3.5-3.9**: Fair - Functional, may need customization
- **<3.5**: In development or specialized use only

**Complexity Levels:**

- **Low**: Straightforward, 1-2 steps, minimal setup
- **Medium**: Moderate complexity, 3-4 steps, some configuration
- **High**: Complex workflow, 5+ steps, significant setup
